summary: Regression after refactors (backend random->secrets.choice, frontend animation constants + DialogDescription). Backend: 8/8 pytest cases pass. Frontend: hero + 12-card grid load; spin shows flash then spin-result-card; reset clears; cuisine filter (Italian) restricts spin result AND 'spots in play' count updates to '1 spot in play'; add-restaurant dialog creates card; hover delete removes card + toast. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactors verified: SHUFFLE_INTERVAL_MS/SHUFFLE_DURATION_MS constants applied correctly in spin(); animation motion-value constants stable across renders.
secrets.choice is CSPRNG-grade and slower than random.choice but negligible for O(N<=1000) lists - acceptable.
@app.on_event startup/shutdown still deprecated (FastAPI lifespan preferred) - non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: None - seeded by backend startup. Test data prefixed TEST_ cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_1 and iteration_2 both 100% green. Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_restaurants.py (8 tests). Delete button is opacity-0 group-hover; must hover card first.
